surface_strategy.name: Grid Borders (The Technical Look)
surface_strategy.description: Expose the skeleton. Data-heavy dashboards should use a visible grid to organize complex task information.
rules: Container layout uses border-collapse or tight grid with 1px borders.
Flat solid backgrounds, 1px subtle border, absolutely no soft shadows.
Hover: Slight background color shift (hover:bg-neutral-900) rather than floating.

layouts.global: Mobile-first responsive. Left-aligned content for optimal readability in data-dense areas.
layouts.dashboard: High Density Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap Strategy: Tight (gap-0) because we use structural Grid Borders to separate content.
layouts.login: Split screen layout: Left side contains the abstract dark minimal geometry image (full bleed), Right side contains the centered login form with generous padding (p-12 to p-24).

motion.hover: Subtle background color change (transition: background-color 0.2s ease), text color brightens.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for task list items using framer-motion (y: 10, opacity: 0 to 1).

components.cards: Cardless design. Flat geometric panels with sharp edges (rounded-none). Use 1px neutral-800 borders.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary buttons use high contrast (bg-white text-black). Secondary buttons are transparent with 1px borders.
components.inputs: Flat, background matching surface, clear 1px borders. focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none.
components.charts: Shadcn Recharts components, styled with semantic colors (Emerald, Amber, Red). No gradients in charts, use solid fills or 20% opacity fills.
components.icons: lucide-react for a clean, consistent look. No emoji icons.

image_urls.description: Black and white abstract cube wall. Use this as an object-cover background image for the visual half of the Login/Signup split screen.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast standards. White text on dark backgrounds must have sufficient contrast.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have clear focus rings.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for animations.

3d_libraries.usage: None. Keep the application 2D, dense, and hyper-performant.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use lucide-react (already installed) for all icons.
Import 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts in index.html or layout, and apply it globally.
Implement the 'Grid Borders' style for the dashboard: the main content area should look like a structured grid where stat cards and lists share common 1px borders.
For the task list, build a dense, list-like layout with hover:bg-neutral-900 effects.
DO NOT use default Shadcn Card with heavy shadows and rounded corners; customize it to be flat, with a sharp 1px border and no shadow (rounded-none).
Ensure all semantic colors (Todo, In Progress, Done, Priorities) are implemented consistently.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-task-button').
Use framer-motion for simple staggered entrance animations on the task list.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make it distinctive and authoritative.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is FORBIDDEN).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, even in flat design.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements only.
NEVER use emoji characters for icons.
Use generous padding within containers to provide breathing room, but keep inter-component gaps tight if using Grid Borders.
Use `sonner` for toasts. It is in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
